message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Update docs for Step 6, then driver rotation to Carson">
The team has unanimously agreed on Carson as Driver for Step 7. Before we rotate:

1. Please update docs/gtd-product-discovery.md — mark Step 6 as [x], move NEXT to Step 7, update current step to 7
2. Commit and push that doc update
3. Confirm when done — then I'll handle the driver rotation (shut you down, respawn you as Reviewer, respawn Carson as Driver)
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already made the doc edits earlier in this session. Let me verify they're correct, then commit and push.

content.content:
483→> **Current step**: 7 -- Clarify as Project
   484→
   485→1. [x] **Navigation + Dashboard** -- Multi-page structure, header nav, route skeleton
   486→2. [x] **Inbox Capture** -- The new entry point (replaces direct todo add)
   487→3. [x] **Contexts** -- Domain type + DB + default contexts for new users
   488→4. [x] **Next Actions with Contexts** -- Core working list
   489→5. [x] **Clarify as Next Action + Trash** -- First clarify paths
   490→6. [x] **Projects** -- Multi-step outcome tracking
   491→7. [ ] **Clarify as Project** -- Inbox -> new project + first next action  <!-- NEXT -->
   492→8. [ ] **Waiting For** -- Delegation tracking
   493→9. [ ] **Clarify as Waiting For** -- Inbox -> waiting for
   494→10. [ ] **Someday/Maybe** -- Idea parking
   495→11. [ ] **Clarify as Someday/Maybe** -- Inbox -> someday/maybe
   496→12. [ ] **Weekly Review** -- The glue that keeps it all trustworthy
   497→13. [ ] **Data Migration + Cleanup** -- Migrate old todos, remove legacy code

content.text:
All three changes are correct:
- Line 483: Current step updated to 7
- Line 490: Step 6 marked `[x]`
- Line 491: `<!-- NEXT -->` moved to Step 7

Now let me commit and push.

input.command:
git add docs/gtd-product-discovery.md .claude-sessions/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Mark Step 6 complete, advance to Step 7 in implementation order

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Commit doc update marking Step 6 complete
